consensus_variance.line_item: CEG forward P/E premium durability (cyclical-peak earnings)
consensus_variance.narrative: The stale ~+50% Street PT and 76%-Buy consensus extrapolate the premium multiple + >20% CAGR while marking PJM-capacity-at-cap and hyperscaler-PPA economics as durable. Our downward variance marks PJM capacity at the FERC cap as a definitional peak, the FERC EL25-49 BTM restriction as compressing the PPA premium, and the Calpine gas mix as diluting the clean-nuclear multiple; it shifts ~2.2pp into the bear tails (a de-rate toward VST's ~14-16x). Two-tailed (nuclear scarcity + the de-rate already done) -> Hold not Sell. Sizing = 18 x 60 x 20 / 10000 = 2.16.

revision_velocity.peer_comparison: Cohort de-rating together; CEG faster than VST (premium 8->7 turns).
revision_velocity.verdict: De-rate underway with EPS guidance reaffirmed; caution is premium durability on cyclical-peak earnings, partly offset by the ~40% drawdown already taken.
